scripts.02-the-inflatable-tent: Our arena is an inflatable tent — not a stadium. Literally. Inside: dark quilted walls, rolling fog, and this insane blue-purple glowing square on the floor. Lowkey secret club energy. Tap to book — Creators AI Hologram Boxing.
scripts.03-meet-the-wave-fighters: One fighter. Six neon colors. All Wave. Wave Gold, Fire, Blue, Silver, Green, Pink — pick your fighter when you grab tickets. Tap to book now.
scripts.04-ar-headset-experience: The moment the headset clicks on — you put on AR gear inside the tent. Wave hologram boxers come alive in the glowing square. Headset POV from 200 MVM. Tap to book — Creators AI Hologram Boxing.
scripts.05-tickets-and-mvm-crypto: Quick ticket breakdown — 200 MVM headset POV, 350 MVM attendee POV. Me vs Me crypto only. Pick your fight and fighter on the Book page. Tap to book now.
scripts.06-pick-your-fighter-win-prizes: Ten thousand dollar prize pool — and you can win too. Buy a ticket, pick your Wave fighter. If they win, you're in the fan prize pool. Tap to book now.
scripts.07-headset-pov-vs-attendee-pov: Two views. One tent. Which one? Headset POV — 200 MVM, your AR angle. Attendee POV — 350 MVM, ringside live feed. Both spectator only. Tap to book.
scripts.08-watch-free-on-kick-twitch: Watch free — no ticket needed. Every hologram fight streams live on Kick and Twitch at creatorsai. Full AR tent experience — book on site. Tap to book now.
scripts.09-book-the-tent-for-your-party: Bring the hologram tent to your party. Birthdays, brand launches, festivals — we set up the inflatable tent, AR headsets, and Wave fights. Tap to request a date — Creators AI Hologram Boxing.
scripts.10-all-ages-family-night: Kid-friendly? Yes — all ages welcome. Spectator AR night, no contact for guests. Family night, birthdays, date night. Tap to book the tent.
scripts.11-home-hero-brand: Creators AI Hologram Boxing. This is the future of fight night — no cap. Inflatable tent, AR headsets, real prize money, HB 002 loading. Tap to book now.
scripts.12-social-kick-twitch-feed: If you're not following creatorsai yet — you're missing the feed. Kick and Twitch live fights, episode drops, ticket countdowns. Follow then tap to book.
scripts.13-how-it-works-four-steps: Hologram boxing in four steps. One — buy with Me vs Me crypto. Two — pick headset or attendee POV. Three — AR headset on in the tent. Four — celebrate winners. Tap to book.
scripts.14-event-archive-hb001: Where it started — Hologram Boxing 001. Six fights, six Wave variants, Wave Gold champion. Watch the recap free — HB 002 tickets open now. Tap to book.
scripts.15-hologram-boxing-002: Hologram Boxing 002 is loading — it's about to hit different. Bigger tent, ten thousand dollar prize pool, Gold vs Fire main event. Tap to book before countdown ends.
scripts.16-downtown-hologram-showdown: We turned downtown into a hologram fight night. Pop-up inflatable tent, DJ, food, four fights. Want us at your festival? Tap to book the tent.
scripts.17-title-fight-night: When the hologram belt was on the line — Wave Gold vs Wave Fire title fight. Full tent production, real prize money. Rematch is HB 002. Tap to watch and book.
scripts.18-fight-card-gold-vs-fire: Main event alert — Wave Gold vs Wave Fire. Hologram Boxing 002. Champion vs knockout artist rematch. Pick a side for the fan prize pool. Tap to book now.
scripts.18b-fight-card-blue-vs-silver: Co-main — Wave Blue vs Wave Silver. Speed vs phantom energy in the glowing square. 200 MVM headset or 350 MVM attendee POV. Tap to book.
scripts.18c-fight-card-green-vs-pink: Undercard heat — Wave Green vs Wave Pink. Power vs pure speed. Don't sleep on the early fights. Pick your fighter. Tap to book now.
scripts.19-watch-episodes-on-demand: Missed the tent? Watch page got you. Full episodes free — Gold vs Fire main event, AR experiences, tent preview. Tap to watch on site.
scripts.20-hb001-recap-highlights: Hologram Boxing 001 — full recap just dropped. VHS-style recap, six Wave variants, Wave Gold takes the title. Watch free then grab HB 002 tickets. Tap to book.
scripts.21-gallery-inside-the-tent: Gallery page equals vibe check for the tent. Tent interior, live crowd, food, drinks, prize night. See the vibe then book your spot. Tap to book.
scripts.22-news-prize-pool-doubled: Breaking — we doubled the prize pool for Hologram Boxing 002. Ten thousand dollars on the line. Book now and pick your fighter. Tap to book.
scripts.23-about-five-step-journey: Arrival to knockout — your hologram boxing night in five steps. Buy MVM, choose POV, enter tent, AR fight, prize night. Tap to book your spot.
scripts.24-hologram-tent-technology: How does the hologram tent actually work? High-tech inflatable structure, glowing floor square, AI wireframe fighters, live AR for every guest. Tap for the full breakdown.
scripts.25-food-drinks-experience: Hologram boxing isn't just the fight — it's a full night out. Food vendors and drink stations inside the tent. Tap to book your spot.
scripts.26-book-ticket-three-steps: Buying a ticket equals three steps on Book. Your details, pick headset or attendee POV, choose fight and fighter — pay in MVM. Tap to start.
scripts.26b-influencer-codes: Got a creator code? Use it at checkout. Codes like GOLDENWAVE auto-fill fight and fighter. Support your creator — tap to book.
scripts.26c-attendee-ringside-pass: Attendee POV gets an auto ringside pass. 350 MVM premium live feed inside the tent. Upgrade your angle. Tap to book now.
scripts.27-apply-hologram-fighter: Creators — this isn't a spectator ticket. Apply as a Wave hologram fighter. Ten thousand dollar prize pool at HB 002. Tap to apply on the Book page.
scripts.28-become-a-partner: Brands — partner with hologram boxing. Sponsorships, venue collabs, influencer codes. Reach the next gen of live entertainment. Tap to contact us.
scripts.29-join-waitlist-early-access: Get in before tickets drop. The world's first AI hologram fighting league is launching. Join the waitlist for early access and ticket alerts. Tap to join.
scripts.30-faq-common-questions: Quick answers before you book. You don't fight — you watch in AR. MVM crypto tickets. Free stream on Kick and Twitch. All ages. Tap for full FAQ.
scripts.31-website-launch: Official website is live — your front row to everything hologram boxing. Fight cards, roster, watch episodes, book tickets, gallery, FAQ. Tap to explore.

voice.note: Script 01 re-voiced with Skye. Plates 02-15 still Gia until credits topped up (~28 credits).
